display_description.he: קורס בן 6 פרקים לעולים חדשים: צ'קליסט השבוע הראשון לפי הסדר הנכון, סל הקליטה, ביטוח הבריאות מהיום הראשון, האולפן והזכויות שאתם לא יודעים לבקש בתחילת הדרך.
display_description.en: A 6-chapter course for new olim: the ordered first-week checklist, the absorption basket, health coverage, ulpan, and the rights you don't know to ask about.

who_is_this_for.he: עולים חדשים שזה עתה נחתו בישראל, או שעומדים לעלות, ורוצים לדעת מה לעשות בתחילת הדרך לפי הסדר הנכון ולא לפי ערימה של משימות מבולגנות.
who_is_this_for.en: New immigrants (olim) who just landed in Israel, or are about to, and want to move through the first 90 days in the order things actually need to happen.

he: לזהות את שלושת המהלכים הקריטיים של השבוע הראשון ולבצע אותם בסדר הנכון
להבין איך משולם סל הקליטה ולמה חשבון הבנק קודם לפגישה במשרד הקליטה
לדעת שביטוח הבריאות מכסה אתכם מהיום הראשון בלי תקופת המתנה, ולבחור קופה ברוגע
לנצל את חלונות הזמן של האולפן והמרת רישיון הנהיגה לפני שהם נסגרים
להכיר את הזכויות וההטבות שאף גורם לא מזכיר לכם, כולל הפטור על הכנסה מחו"ל
en: Identify the three critical week-one moves and do them in the right order
Understand how Sal Klita is paid and why the bank account comes before the absorption meeting
Know that health coverage applies from day one with no waiting period, and choose a fund calmly
Use the ulpan and driver's-license windows before they close
Learn the rights and benefits nobody surfaces, including the foreign-income tax exemption

images.alt_he: המסלול הקריטי של השבוע הראשון: שלושה מהלכים לפי הסדר
images.alt_en: The week-one critical path: three ordered moves
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: three numbered circular nodes (1, 2, 3) connected left to right by a single directional arrow path, representing an ordered sequence. Node 1 shows a tiny ID-card icon, node 2 a small bank-building icon, node 3 a calendar-with-checkmark icon. The numerals 1, 2, 3 are large and clear. Single Israeli-blue accent on the connecting arrow, deep navy node outlines and icons on warm beige paper. Flat 2D, no text labels other than the numerals, no clutter.

images.alt_he: מתעודת זהות זמנית בנייר לכרטיס חכם ביומטרי
images.alt_en: From temporary paper ID to biometric smart card
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: two document shapes side by side with an arrow between them. Left: a thin paper sheet with a small clock icon (temporary). Right: a thicker rounded plastic card with a small chip rectangle (biometric smart card). The arrow points left to right. Navy outlines, one Israeli-blue accent on the chip, warm beige paper background. Flat 2D, no text labels, no faces.

images.alt_he: סל קליטה: תשלום ראשון ואחריו תשלומים חודשיים
images.alt_en: Sal Klita paid as a first installment plus monthly payments
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a horizontal timeline with one tall bar on the far left (the large first installment) followed by a series of six shorter even bars across the months, suggesting a tapering payment schedule. A thin baseline runs underneath. The first bar in Israeli-blue, the monthly bars in navy, on warm beige paper. Flat 2D bar-chart-on-paper feel, no text labels, no currency symbols.

images.alt_he: עולים חדשים מבוטחים מהיום הראשון בלי תקופת המתנה
images.alt_en: New olim are covered from day one with no waiting period
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a simple shield or heart-in-shield icon centered, with a small airplane icon to its left connected by a short arrow, conveying coverage starting at the moment of arrival. A small zero-with-a-slash badge in the corner suggests no waiting period. Navy linework, single Israeli-blue accent on the shield, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, no text labels.

images.alt_he: חלונות הזמן של האולפן והמרת רישיון הנהיגה
images.alt_en: The ulpan and driver's-license entitlement windows
images.prompt: Editorial illustration with two horizontal rows. TOP ROW: an open-book icon on the left, then a thin horizontal line, then the large numeral 18 with a tiny 'mo' beside it (the ulpan window is 18 months). BOTTOM ROW: a steering-wheel icon on the left, then a thin horizontal line, then the large numeral 5 with a tiny 'yr' beside it (the license window is 5 years). Pair each icon strictly with the number on its own row: book goes with 18, steering wheel goes with 5. Navy icons and lines, navy numerals, one Israeli-blue accent on the two icons, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, the only text is '18 mo' and '5 yr', no other labels.

images.alt_en: Prioritizing ulpan, license, and housing in the first months
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a vertical ranked list of four small icons descending like a staircase, each on its own step: a key (housing), an open book (ulpan), a steering wheel (license), a house (long-term housing). Numerals 1 to 4 beside the steps. Navy step outlines and icons, single Israeli-blue accent on the top step, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, numerals only, no other text.

images.alt_he: שעון הפטור על הכנסה מחו"ל לעשר שנים
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a large circular clock or dial face with the numeral 10 prominent at the center, and a small globe icon beside it to suggest foreign-source income. A thin Israeli-blue arc sweeps around part of the dial to suggest a countdown window. Navy dial outline, Israeli-blue arc accent, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, the numeral 10 is the only text.

images.alt_he: הזכויות הנוספות של העולה החדש על פני כמה גופים
images.alt_en: The long tail of olim rights across agencies
images.prompt: Editorial illustration: a central node labeled with a small star icon, with five thin lines radiating out to five small distinct icons: a building (Bituach Leumi), a house with a percent-free badge (arnona), a shipping box (customs), a graduation cap (credentials), a small bank (fees). Navy linework and icons, single Israeli-blue accent on the central star, warm beige paper. Flat 2D, icon-only, no text labels.
